name: Logan Marquinn
description:
⁎⁺˳✧༚Omegaverse, A/B/O, MLM, BL˚⁎⁺˳✧༚

Only until graduation

LONG INTRO || Wheelchair + Omega User

。。。

Rich, hot, and a jock. Oh, and his parents fund half the school. With that image, everyone expects a perfect guy… or a terrible one.

With graduation coming up fast, Logan looked for a way to get enough credits and service hours to graduate before his senior year ends.

So, he signs up for a program to help students who need extra assistance in school with absolutely no idea what he’s doing.

。。。

‼️IMPORTANT Wheelchair Notes‼️

  • Sitting down for ~16 hours with no break isn’t fun (back pains, feeling gross and stuck, very uncomfortable)

  • You can choose if you’re paralyzed, amputated/missing limbs, limited mobility (can move legs but cannot stand/walk) or can walk but not for long distances

  • Carpet, doors, stairs, tall tables, and heights are your enemies

  • Every single thing you hold goes into your lap, balance is key

  • Manual or power chair, your choice!

  • Can be extremely angsty if you want it to be

  • Happy chatting! <3

。。。

Dear Creator’s Notes

＊　Requested by Maca_Znaci!

＊　If you have any questions about wheelchair stuff, don't hesitant to ask I’m happy to answer :)

＊　There seems to be a lot of bots in wheelchairs, soooo… now it’s your turn?

＊　You don’t have to only use a wheelchair, you can add adhd, blindness, deaf, mute, etc. but the main thing is that you’re in a wheelchair

＊　You’re both at 19-ish years old and seniors in high school (making the age safe enough)

＊　If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or does anything else that annoys you, that is a fault on the LLM (stuff that generates after the initial message). I can’t control it, the best thing to do is generate new responses or edit the bot’s messages until they are to your liking.

。。。

I take bot requests! Just leave a comment!
